LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: RESPONDENTS GAVIN NEWSOM, JOSE CISNEROS'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR #8189
PETITION FOR WRIT OF PROHIBITION (FILED AT INSISTENCE OF LITIGANT) FILED BY PETITIONER NICHOLAW, ANDY

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER ANDY NICHOLAW'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY. IN ANY EVENT IT FAILS TO PRESENT ANY NEW FACTS OF LAW THAT WERE UNAVAILABLE PRIOR TO THE COURTS CHALLENGED RULING. IN ANY EVENT IT OFFERS NO BASIS ON WHICH TO CHANGE THE COURTS RULING. AN ORAL DECLARATION WAS READ ON THE RECORD BY MR. NICHOLAW. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR WRIT OF ERROR, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PETITIONER NICHOLAW, ANDY

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ANDY NICHOLAW, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. OWEN J. CLEMENTS, CHIEF SPECIAL LITIGATION, TEL. NO. 554-3944 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER ANDY NICHOLAW'S Motion For Reconsideration IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY. IN ANY EVENT IT FAILS TO PRESENT ANY NEW FACTS OF LAW THAT WERE UNAVAILABLE PRIOR TO THE COURTS CHALLENGED RULING. IN ANY EVENT IT OFFERS NO BASIS ON WHICH TO CHANGE THE COURTS RULING. AN ORAL DECLARATION WAS READ ON THE RECORD BY MR. NICHOLAW. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Owen J. Clements of the Office of the City Attorney (554.3944) for respondents and moving parties; Andy Nicholaw (925.600.1095) petitioner and opposing party appearing in propria persona. The Court made a personal disclosure. No objections were raised and the matter was argued. The court ruled as follows: RESPONDENTS GAVIN NEWSOM, JOSE CISNEROS'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION is sustained without leave to amend. Order and judgment signed in open court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189
